markdown:
# 每日 AI/产品/开源动态 - 2026-06-25

## 产品上新

暂无值得单列的条目。

## 开源热门

1. [harry0703/MoneyPrinterTurbo](https://github.com/harry0703/MoneyPrinterTurbo)
   - 信号：GitHub Trending
   - 做什么：利用AI大模型，一键生成高清短视频 Generate short videos with one click using AI LLM.
   - 为什么需要：开发者、开源项目维护者、技术团队。降低模型选择、调用失败和多供应商容灾的复杂度。

2. [mvanhorn/last30days-skill](https://github.com/mvanhorn/last30days-skill)
   - 信号：GitHub Trending
   - 做什么：AI agent skill that researches any topic across Reddit, X, YouTube, HN, Polymarket, and the web - then synthesizes a grounded summary /last30days An AI agent-led search engine scor
   - 为什么需要：开发者、开源项目维护者、技术团队。降低信息获取、工具搭建或重复工作的成本。

3. [iptv-org/iptv](https://github.com/iptv-org/iptv)
   - 信号：GitHub Trending
   - 做什么：Collection of publicly available IPTV channels from all over the world IPTV Collection of publicly available IPTV (Internet Protocol television) channels from all over the world.
   - 为什么需要：开发者、开源项目维护者、技术团队。降低信息获取、工具搭建或重复工作的成本。

4. [Egonex-AI/Understand-Anything](https://github.com/Egonex-AI/Understand-Anything)
   - 信号：GitHub Trending
   - 做什么：Graphs that teach > graphs that impress.
   - 为什么需要：开发者、开源项目维护者、技术团队。降低信息获取、工具搭建或重复工作的成本。

5. [Leonxlnx/taste-skill](https://github.com/Leonxlnx/taste-skill)
   - 信号：GitHub Trending
   - 做什么：Taste-Skill - gives your AI good taste.
   - 为什么需要：开发者、开源项目维护者、技术团队。降低信息获取、工具搭建或重复工作的成本。

6. [hardikpandya/stop-slop](https://github.com/hardikpandya/stop-slop)
   - 信号：GitHub Trending
   - 做什么：A skill file for removing AI tells from prose Stop Slop A skill for removing AI tells from prose.
   - 为什么需要：开发者、开源项目维护者、技术团队。降低信息获取、工具搭建或重复工作的成本。

7. [mukul975/Anthropic-Cybersecurity-Skills](https://github.com/mukul975/Anthropic-Cybersecurity-Skills)
   - 信号：GitHub Trending
   - 做什么：817 structured cybersecurity skills for AI agents · Mapped to 6 frameworks: MITRE ATT&CK, NIST CSF 2.0, MITRE ATLAS, D3FEND, NIST AI RMF & MITRE F3 (Fight Fraud) · agentskills.io s
   - 为什么需要：开发者、开源项目维护者、技术团队。降低模型选择、调用失败和多供应商容灾的复杂度。

## 公司动态

暂无值得单列的条目。

## 技术前沿

1. [DomainShuttle: Freeform Open Domain Subject-driven Text-to-video Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.26058)
   - 信号：HuggingFace Papers
   - 做什么：Open domain subject-driven text-to-video (S2V) generation has drawn significant interest in academia and industry.
   - 影响与背景：AI 行业一线博客/论文，反映前沿技术和产品动态。

2. [Improved Large Language Diffusion Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.25331)
   - 信号：HuggingFace Papers
   - 做什么：Modern large language models are predominantly trained with autoregressive factorization and causal attention.
   - 影响与背景：AI 行业一线博客/论文，反映前沿技术和产品动态。

3. [V-Zero: Answer-Label-Free On-Policy Distillation with Contrastive Evidence Gating for Fine-Grained Visual Reasoning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.25319)
   - 信号：HuggingFace Papers
   - 做什么：Fine-grained visual reasoning requires multimodal large language models (MLLMs) to identify task-relevant visual evidence and ground their reasoning in local image regions.
   - 影响与背景：AI 行业一线博客/论文，反映前沿技术和产品动态。

4. [Causal-rCM: A Unified Teacher-Forcing and Self-Forcing Open Recipe for Autoregressive Diffusion Distillation in Streaming Video Generation and Interac...](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.25473)
   - 信号：HuggingFace Papers
   - 做什么：Autoregressive video diffusion with causal diffusion transformers has emerged as a major paradigm for real-time streaming video generation and action-conditioned interactive world
   - 影响与背景：AI 行业一线博客/论文，反映前沿技术和产品动态。

5. [TryOnCrafter: Unleashing Camera Trajectories for Realistic Video Virtual Try-on via a Renderable 4D Try-on Proxy](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.26092)
   - 信号：HuggingFace Papers
   - 做什么：While Video Virtual Try-on (VVT) has achieved remarkable progress in synthesizing realistic garment overlays on dynamic subjects, existing paradigms remains fundamentally constrain
   - 影响与背景：AI 行业一线博客/论文，反映前沿技术和产品动态。

6. [Autodata: An agentic data scientist to create high quality synthetic data](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.25996)
   - 信号：HuggingFace Papers
   - 做什么：We introduce Autodata, a general method that enables AI agents to act as data scientists who build high quality training and evaluation data.
   - 影响与背景：AI 行业一线博客/论文，反映前沿技术和产品动态。

7. [Are We Ready For An Agent-Native Memory System?](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.24775)
   - 信号：HuggingFace Papers
   - 做什么：Memory for large language model (LLM) agents has rapidly evolved from simple retrieval-augmented mechanisms into a data management system that supports persistent information stora
   - 影响与背景：AI 行业一线博客/论文，反映前沿技术和产品动态。

8. [Wan-Streamer v0.1: End-to-end Real-time Interactive Foundation Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.25041)
   - 信号：HuggingFace Papers
   - 做什么：We present Wan-Streamer, a native-streaming, end-to-end interactive foundation model designed from the ground up for real-time, low-latency, full-duplex audio-visual interaction.
   - 影响与背景：AI 行业一线博客/论文，反映前沿技术和产品动态。

9. [IV-CoT: Implicit Visual Chain-of-Thought for Structure-Aware Text-to-Image Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.24849)
   - 信号：HuggingFace Papers
   - 做什么：Unified multi-modal large language models (MLLMs) have achieved strong text-to-image generation quality, but still struggle with structure-aware prompt following, where object coun
